title: Armor Stands With Arms | ASWA
description: This datapacks adds the arms to the armor stands!
body:
![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48a1954f14e2e1d4816014bddff2f6e705d10158.png) ASWA is a server-side Data Pack / Mod that adds a parity with the Bedrock Edition. The armor stands have arms now! # Website If you have any questions, need assistance, or simply want to share your thoughts or feedback, feel free to reach out. We're always here to help and would love to hear from you – whether you're looking for answers, suggestions, or just want to let us know how we're doing.
